name: cogni-portfolio
description: Portfolio messaging and proposition planning for SMEs using IS/DOES/MEANS framework. Features are market-independent (IS). Advantages (DOES) and benefits (MEANS) are market-specific. Includes TAM/SAM/SOM targeting, competitor and customer analysis, deep-dive research for features and propositions, Lean Canvas bootstrapping, presentation-ready pitch narratives, and eight pluggable industry taxonomies.
